meaning: n.有势力的人adj.有势力的,强大的,有力的adv.很,极,非常
examples: You know mighty well you can't.
There was a flash and a mighty bang.
It's something you'll be mighty proud of.
Sharma gave the crowd something to cheer with a mighty 90 metre swipe over mid-wicket.
What had begun with a fashion for hats ended with the fall of a mighty empire.
